name: Precisely

seo.meta_description: Precisely: Precisely — Enterprise location intelligence platform for geocoding, address validation, and demographics enrichment.

when_to_use: Enterprise address validation and geocoding for global addresses
Demographics and location intelligence enrichment for analytics
Boundary and spatial data services for insurance underwriting
Batch geocoding millions of customer addresses accurately
Data quality and governance for address data in enterprise CRM

pros: Deep demographic and location data enrichment
Trusted by insurance and banking verticals
Extensive coverage for risk and compliance
cons: Enterprise pricing and long procurement cycles
Legacy brand rooted in Pitney Bowes era
Overkill for standard ecom address checks
review.verdict: Serious location intelligence for regulated industries; modern startups usually overpay here.
review.best_for: Insurance, banking, and telco needing risk-grade location data
review.not_for: Startups just needing clean address autocomplete
